name: Rosemary Vinegar
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh rosemary leaves plus long sprigs for garnish, rinsed and drained well
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very clean 1-quart glass jar, combine the rosemary leaves, garlic, and vinegar.
2. Cover with the lid and let the mixture steep in a cool, dark place for at least 4 days and up to 2 weeks, depending on the desired strength.
3. Strain the vinegar through a fine sieve into a clean glass pitcher, discarding the rosemary leaves.
4. Pour the strained vinegar into 2 very clean half-pint glass jars.
5. Add one rosemary sprig and some of the reserved garlic to each jar.
6. Seal the jars with lids.
